title: dalea carthagenensis var. isthmicola
intro: Dalea carthagenensis var. isthmicola, also known as the Isthmus prairie clover, is a perennial legume plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dalea carthagenensis var. isthmicola include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
